faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: How to become a nephrologist after 12th?
faqs.answer:
Below are steps to become a Nephrologist after 12th -
Complete 12th with PCB
Clear NEET-UG
Complete MBBS (5.5 years)
Qualify NEET-PG
Pursue MD (3 years)
Appear for NEET-SS.
Complete DM/DNB in Nephrology (3 years)

college_info.intro:
The flagship programme offered at Virohan GH Raisoni Skilltech University is a BSc. The college offers this programme to students at the UG level. Further, the college offers this programme to provide students with theoretical and practical knowledge. Virohan: G.H. Raisoni Skilltech University courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry.
The BSc programme offered at the college covers core courses in the areas of MLT, OTT, Physiotherapy, Optometry, MRIT, etc. Students additionally receive training in English Language & Power Skills Learning, which includes aspects like communication, personality development, digital literacy, and more. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Virohan Nagpur, in the table provided below:

admission_overview.title: Virohan - G.H. Raisoni Skilltech University, Nagpur Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Virohan - G.H. Raisoni Skilltech University, Nagpur admissionsare done based on merit. The institute offers eight courses at the UG level. The courses are Undergraduate programme in Operation Theatre Technology (OTT), Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT), Medical Radiology and Imaging Techniques (MRIT), Bachelor in Anaesthesia and Operation Theatre Technology (AOTT), Undergraduate Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT), Bachelor in Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology (MRIT), Bachelor of Optometry (OPTOM) and Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT). reviews_list.review_title: Comprehensive campus experience with good placements and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements at Hindustan College of Arts and Science are satisfactory, with good opportunities for top performers. Many reputed companies visit the campus, offering decent packages. Pre-placement training helps students improve soft skills and interview readiness.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers spacious classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are clean, with 24/7 water, Wi-Fi, and security. The mess serves hygienic food, and recreational areas create a comfortable living and learning environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Aug 2025) M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 84% of students are placed in specialized services. Many students found jobs in other companies. The highest salary offered was 30 LPA, and the minimum offered was 7 LPA. Big companies like Modern, Emcure, Zydus Cadila, etc., visit the college for recruitment. Almost 77% of the students received internships. The higher-level roles offered are Food Safety Specialist, Microbiologist, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hotels were well run; Wi-Fi was installed, and classrooms and libraries were also maintained. Overall, materials and equipment are above average. The food in the mess and restaurant was good and suited our taste. The stadium was good too, with games to play.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

review_content.Placements: Our portfolio determines where we are placed. We receive 95% placement help from our college. Because it pertains to experience, it is beneficial rather than comforting. Top recruiters like Accenture, Deloitte, Zomato, and others visit our college. We enroll in positions such as robotics engineer and game developer, among others. The highest salary package offered is 34 LPA. Around 92% of students can find work.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hindustan College of Arts and Science is world-class and evergreen and offers a pollution-free environment. Our college provides good lab facilities with good internet and Wi-Fi facilities which enables students to enjoy their practice sessions. Our college offers clean food and has good medical facilities, as well as experienced doctors. Our college encourages students who are passionate about sports.

overview_faqs.question: Is Hindustan College of Arts and Science a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Hindusthan College of Arts and Science (HICAS), Coimbatore is a private institution managed by the Hindustan Educational and Charitable Trust. Accredited by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) with an A+ grade, the Hindusthan College of Arts and Science was established in 1998. The college has secured accreditation from bharathia univerasity for 33 Under Graduate Programmes, 16 Post Graduate Programmes, 10 Research Centers, 3 Diploma and 2 Certification. MBA and MCA Programmes have approval from the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), validating its academic standards and curriculum.

review_summary.college_name: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

content.Placements: 95-100% placement is available. The highest salary offered is 16 LPA, and the minimum and average salary is 3 LPA and 10 LPA, respectively. Top recruiters are Citibank, Zynga, HDFC Bank, etc. Top roles offered are IT Consultant, Data Analyst, etc. 90% of students get internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is terrible. The classrooms and halls are well-equipped. There are separate departments for each course. There are more than 20 conference halls hosting events and competitions, where students studying various subjects, organize competitions and other events. Several facilities have been developed for sports and other activities.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.

content.Placements: 62% and 83% of students were placed. The pay scale is 11 LPA to 25 LPA. Data analysts and software engineers are among the positions available. The lowest wage provided is 7 LPA, while the highest income is 33 LPA. We provide good placements at our college. Informatica, Cyberark, Splunk, and others are top recruiters. 70% of students find internships.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with modern audio-visual technology. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus. There are two hotels that are well maintained. Dedicated workstations are equipped with appropriate software and equipment, allowing for hands-on operation. There is also a cricket/football field as well as basketball and all sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive campus experience with good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: Placements at Hindustan College of Arts and Science are satisfactory, with good opportunities for top performers. Many reputed companies visit the campus, offering decent packages. Pre-placement training helps students improve soft skills and interview readiness.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers spacious classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are clean, with 24/7 water, Wi-Fi, and security. The mess serves hygienic food, and recreational areas create a comfortable living and learning environment.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Aug 2025) M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.

content.Placements: Approximately 84% of students are placed in specialized services. Many students found jobs in other companies. The highest salary offered was 30 LPA, and the minimum offered was 7 LPA. Big companies like Modern, Emcure, Zydus Cadila, etc., visit the college for recruitment. Almost 77% of the students received internships. The higher-level roles offered are Food Safety Specialist, Microbiologist, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: The hotels were well run; Wi-Fi was installed, and classrooms and libraries were also maintained. Overall, materials and equipment are above average. The food in the mess and restaurant was good and suited our taste. The stadium was good too, with games to play.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

content.Placements: Our portfolio determines where we are placed. We receive 95% placement help from our college. Because it pertains to experience, it is beneficial rather than comforting. Top recruiters like Accenture, Deloitte, Zomato, and others visit our college. We enroll in positions such as robotics engineer and game developer, among others. The highest salary package offered is 34 LPA. Around 92% of students can find work.
content.Infrastructure: Hindustan College of Arts and Science is world-class and evergreen and offers a pollution-free environment. Our college provides good lab facilities with good internet and Wi-Fi facilities which enables students to enjoy their practice sessions. Our college offers clean food and has good medical facilities, as well as experienced doctors. Our college encourages students who are passionate about sports.

admission_overview.college_name: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai admission 2025 is open.Affiliated to theUniversity of Madras,Hindustan College of Arts & Science (HCAS), Chennai is a part of the Hindustan Group of Institutions.HCAS admission is merit-based and registrations for online admission to HCAS are open as per its official website.The college offers 17 undergraduate, seven postgraduate, three MPhil, and two PhD programmes in varied fields such asScience, Commerce,Humanities,Management,Information Technology, etc.HCAS Chennaialso offers distance education in some of the PG programmes such as MBA, MSc, and MCA.

For UG, PG, and Research courses, candidates must have completed their Class 12, graduation, and post-graduation, respectively. It also offers some add-on courses along with some of its UG/ PG courses. HCAS Admission to most of the offered programmes is merit-based. Therefore. candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria. Find below theHCAS Chennai courseseligibility/selection criteria for admission 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai fees range from INR 50,000 to INR 2 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the fee once their application form is verified and approved. The college also offers merit scholarships to its students. Find below the course-wise fees for 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
For admission toHCAS courses, candidates must complete the multi-step admission procedure which is completely online. Find below the detailed steps:
Step 1: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Application

Candidates must visitHindustan College's official websiteto apply. The application process begins with a new registration, which requires candidates to sign-upon the official website of the college. After registration, candidates can access the application form.
Step 2: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Shortlisting

Eligible applications will be shortlisted for the further admission process. Shortlisting is done based on the performance in the candidate's last qualifying exam. Shortlisted candidates will receive a confirmation mail. Now candidates can make the fee payment to finalise the admission,
Step 3: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Documents Verifications
Candidates will have to visit the college office for document verification. The date and time will be mailed.

faqs.question: Can I join Hindustan College of Arts and Science directly?
faqs.answer: The college provides diverse undergraduate programs in fields like arts, science, commerce, management, and computer applications. Admission to Hindustan College of Arts and Science is based on merit, considering the entrance exam marks along with Plus Two / HSC / Intermediate / equivalent examinations marks, etc. Hindustan University offers admission to all of its courses based on a valid score in the respective entrance exams, so it is not possible to join Hindustan College of Arts and Science directly. Candidates can visit the official website of the Hindusthan College of Arts and Science to apply for admission through both online and offline modes

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Hindustan College of Arts and Science placements?
faqs.answer: The best package deal presented at Hindustan university of Arts and technological know-how placements varies by way of area and year for instance: At the Coimbatore campus, the best package deal become INR four LPA for the 2020 batch. For the 2022 batch, the very best package deal went up drastically to INR 8.2 LPA. At the Chennai campus, the very best package deal supplied for the duration of the 2024 placements stood at INR 5.50 LPA. Some other record mentions a maximum package of INR 23.30 LPA offered on the Chennai campus powered by Sunstone for the 2023 placements. Please word that these figures are concern to exchange with every placement season and might vary primarily based on different packages and sectors. It's usually a terrific concept to check the today's placement reviews or the college's reliable verbal exchange for the most recent statistics.

Based on the rankings from Outlook-ICARE, Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook-ICARE ranking system. In the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai's rank is #79, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Arts' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai's rank is #77, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'BBA' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai's rank is #84, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'BCA' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai's rank is #64, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is terrible. The classrooms and halls are well-equipped. There are separate departments for each course. Several facilities have been developed for sports and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are equipped with modern audio-visual technology. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus. There are two hotels that are well maintained. Dedicated workstations are equipped with appropriate software and equipment, allowing for hands-on operation. There is also a cricket/football field as well as basketball and all sports.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive campus experience with good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college offers spacious classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are clean, with 24/7 water, Wi-Fi, and security. The mess serves hygienic food, and recreational areas create a comfortable living and learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.
reviews.review_text: The hotels were well run; Wi-Fi was installed, and classrooms and libraries were also maintained. Overall, materials and equipment are above average. The food in the mess and restaurant was good and suited our taste. The stadium was good too, with games to play.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: Hindustan College of Arts and Science is world-class and evergreen and offers a pollution-free environment. Our college provides good lab facilities with good internet and Wi-Fi facilities which enables students to enjoy their practice sessions. Our college offers clean food and has good medical facilities, as well as experienced doctors. Our college encourages students who are passionate about sports.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for M.Sc. in the computer science course.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like Wi-Fi in classrooms, computer labs, and a library for the students. The college has provided laptops to all the students. The hostel is good in terms of infrastructure, and the food served is also good. A medical laboratory is located in our college, and various sports events are also held.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.Sc. in computer science courses.
reviews.review_text: This college is well-maintained and one of the best colleges in India. Campus is excellent, and the location is suitable for students. This college is well-equipped. Classrooms are well-equipped. Wi-Fi system is also good, and connectivity is provided. It also has a library. For boys, there is a separate hostel named management hostel, for girls. They go to triveni complex. It also offers a good riot, a dedicated student health center, and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for the M.Sc. in Information Technology course.
reviews.review_text: Our college has first-rate facilities. Every course at our college has its own computer. There is Wi-Fi at our college. The design of the classrooms is requisite. The hostel is excellent. The hotel's cuisine is good. Good food is served in the restaurant. Clinics are available at our college. Participation in extracurricular activities and sports is encouraged among students.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion on my college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are good, and they are very friendly with all students except one or two. Other things like the library, classroom, and others are good. The hostel is very bad. They will only take fees from us, but everything will be bad, like food and other things. They will only provide a room and food for the highest fees (₹25,000 per month) I have ever paid for a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: My course has amazing materials. Wi-Fi and air conditioning are accessible in all classrooms. There is plenty of computer space, classrooms are very large and pleasant, and libraries are available for departments. Good eating is convenient and straightforward. A reputable clinic operates around the clock. Sports and games play an important role.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. In Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories and classrooms were clean and well-equipped. The hostel provides all amenities such as a gym, Wi-Fi, and a game area, as well as all sports equipment. The quality of mess meals is average. Our college has two libraries, one for the MBA, medical department, and the other for the Information Technology branch, and both have all of the texts available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are superb. We pay special attention to facilities such as a state-of-the-art library and a clinic for students and professors. Classrooms are outfitted with ventilated displays. We have around 5 large and small canteens with average meal quality. The hostel rooms are lovely, the old ones livable, and the modern ones ideal.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was best college for the MSc in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: College had best infrastructure I have ever seen or experienced. College management met all of pupils fundamental needs. Other advanced features include classrooms with smart boards, electricity, and internet access. College settings and environs were maintained on a daily basis. Pleasant setting for mental wellness and concentration.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped infrastructure with good lab facilities and projectors in all classes, Wi-Fi connectivity, a good library, and a pleasant learning environment. The hostel facilities are excellent; the rooms are spotless, and the food is fresh and healthy. The amenities are cleaned daily, and the rooms are big and air-conditioned. Medical facilities are adequate, and staff are attentive to students' needs. Sports and activities help us stay healthy and fit.

reviews.review_heading: I can rate this college out of 5, & I can give it 4.5 because of the best teachers.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and well maintained. Good teaching hostel facilities are well maintained. Hostel food is also good. We have all facilities like washing clothes and we have a generator facility also in the hostel. Our wife is well maintaining hospitality .

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Molecular Medicine - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Yes, go for this college it's so good.

review_content.Placements: At Amrita Vidyapeeth, the placement is 95%. This college is comparable to IITS, NITS, and DTU. This was one of the best colleges in Kerala last year; the highest package goes to INR 35 lacs. And that, with its branch and the lowest package, was INR 18 lacs, so the average package here is around INR 15 lacs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course is amazing. You will have to work mostly in the laboratory on several projects. You have to make so much analysis that there will be 40 experiments in total. So you have to work a lot for the exam. The overall infrastructure of the college is so good. You have so many things to learn. As classes goes on virtually also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. with Research in Molecular Medicine - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Best lifescience and Nanotech research in India.

review_content.Placements: I have not graduated yet, so no one in my batch has been placed. We had an industrial visit to Merck Life Sciences where they asked students to submit their CVs. They also assured us that they would bring in recruiters from companies if we are interested in securing a job after our degree. The placement cell is very dedicated and sends us details of internship and placement opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The ASNSMM R&D facility is within the Amrita Hospital, which makes it even more convenient to receive patient samples for research. Our department has state-of-the-art facilities for Medical and Nano Research. Free Wi-Fi, clean washrooms, and water dispensers are available in classrooms and on the research floor. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, screens for projectors, speakers, microphones, and separate whiteboards. Each class can accommodate more than 100 students. Hostel facilities are available separately for boys and girls. Each hostel room can accommodate three students and is assigned according to roll number, but we are free to rearrange later. Free Wi-Fi, clean bathrooms, and five washing machines are available in undergraduate hostels. Other amenities like a coffee shop (open until 11 PM), gym, and top-notch medical facilities are also available since the hostel is located inside the hospital compound. Medical services are provided 24/7.

content.Placements: One person got a position of physician assistant as it is a new course and is based on research people tend to do further studies and finish their Ph.D. degree but people have had a 6 Lacs per month packages in korea as well. Several. People have been pursuing in M.Sc. Molecular medicine in same college. This course have a huge value in foreign countries.
content.Infrastructure: We have computer labs, huge library with study space and individual high teach labs for all research fields like cell culture, neurology, microbiology, stem cell, and so on. It gives you so much exposure to advanced technologies that are very expensive and difficult to find. Although food is a bit of a problem it is not that bad.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Molecular Medicine - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Yes, go for this college it's so good.

content.Placements: At Amrita Vidyapeeth, the placement is 95%. This college is comparable to IITS, NITS, and DTU. This was one of the best colleges in Kerala last year; the highest package goes to INR 35 lacs. And that, with its branch and the lowest package, was INR 18 lacs, so the average package here is around INR 15 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: The course is amazing. You will have to work mostly in the laboratory on several projects. You have to make so much analysis that there will be 40 experiments in total. So you have to work a lot for the exam. The overall infrastructure of the college is so good. You have so many things to learn. As classes goes on virtually also.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. with Research in Molecular Medicine - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best lifescience and Nanotech research in India.

content.Placements: I have not graduated yet, so no one in my batch has been placed. We had an industrial visit to Merck Life Sciences where they asked students to submit their CVs. They also assured us that they would bring in recruiters from companies if we are interested in securing a job after our degree. The placement cell is very dedicated and sends us details of internship and placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The ASNSMM R&D facility is within the Amrita Hospital, which makes it even more convenient to receive patient samples for research. Our department has state-of-the-art facilities for Medical and Nano Research. Free Wi-Fi, clean washrooms, and water dispensers are available in classrooms and on the research floor. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, screens for projectors, speakers, microphones, and separate whiteboards. Each class can accommodate more than 100 students. Hostel facilities are available separately for boys and girls. Each hostel room can accommodate three students and is assigned according to roll number, but we are free to rearrange later. Free Wi-Fi, clean bathrooms, and five washing machines are available in undergraduate hostels. Other amenities like a coffee shop (open until 11 PM), gym, and top-notch medical facilities are also available since the hostel is located inside the hospital compound. Medical services are provided 24/7.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Molecular Medicine - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college considers individual needs.

content.Placements: The main sources of recruitment for the students of molecular medicine would be the biotech and pharma companies over there as in the position of searching. While Rajiv Gandhi Centre for Biotechnology located in Thiruvananthapuram is one of the major hiring partners.
content.Infrastructure: Students with various linguistic barriers studying various courses offered in the college of AVV on the Kochi campus. The laboratories are constructed in a specialized way with all the necessary features required for searching. If students are not okay with hostels can shift to outside for hostel facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharm.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Not absolutely dissatisfied as they provided average placement to students last year in 2023.

review_content.Placements: 55% of students were placed in pharmaceutical companies, and 45% either opened their own medical shops or worked in hospitals. The highest package was 2.3L per annum, the lowest was 1.2L per annum, and the average package was 1.6L per annum. Some pharmaceutical companies that visited for placements include Ventus Pharma, Sun Pharmaceutical Industries, Cipla, Surya Pharmaceutical Ltd, and Dabur Pharma Ltd. Cipla and Sun Pharma are the top recruiting companies. 100% of students got a 3-month internship at government hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are average. The college provides labs with proper equipment and classrooms. There is a library, but no Wi-Fi is provided. There is no hostel facility, but there is a canteen, and sports and games facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: College is best for lower budget students and campus is good.

review_content.Placements: No companies will come for placement in this college. 0% student get placement. For all students of B. Pharma, it is mandatory to do 3 month hospital training and 3 month industrial training in last year. College offers courses like B. Pharma.D Pharma, M. Pharma (pharmaceutical, chemistry, pharmaceutics), BCA BBA MBA .
review_content.Infrastructure: All over infrastructure is average but campus is in full of greenery and plants. Classroom are in much better condition. Wi-Fi service is not available in campus. Labs are not much better and all equipment in labs get rusted and are not in working condition. No canteen is available in campus but college administrations allow to go outside college for lunch. Sports is conducted by college administration in college campus at end of annual seasons. College administration doesn't provide any medical facilities instead of being pharmacy institutions. Library are average and all kinds of book available in accordance to PCI norms .

reviews_list.review_title: Madhubani Medical College helped me fulfil my dreams.

review_content.Placements: My batch strength is 150 students. There is no term called placements in the medical field as the medical graduates get direct jobs in either private or government hospitals, PHC or medical colleges. The salary ranges from around 65,000 to 90,000 per month, depending on their state of practice. All students need to do a compulsory rotatory internship in the college or some other medical college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is decent as per the latest NMC rule. The campus has attached hospitals, where one has to do his or her clinical postings during their internship from 2nd year onwards. The hospital is a 300-bedded multispeciality hospital with all the modern facilities. All the classrooms are smart classes with LCD screens and projectors to assist teaching. The library is quite good with all the recent editions of medical books and journals along with reference books also. The mess provides a varied range of dishes ranging from south Indian to north Indian and Chinese too. The hostel rooms and hospital are Wi-Fi enabled.

individual_reviews.title: Overall good college. Good studies, good environment and Teachers are good.

content.Placements: Since this is an MBBS college, no placements happen here. MBBS is a 5.5-year course. After that, we can get a minimum salary around ₹65,000 to ₹70,000 per month as a junior resident doctor. This salary varies from state to state. In Delhi, the salary is even higher.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a well-organized infrastructure. It has a Wi-Fi campus, a library, academic buildings, a hospital, a blood bank, and an oxygen plant. The hostel facility is very good, with each room equipped with air conditioning, washing machines, water purifiers, geysers, etc. The food quality is also decent, with the menu changing every week. They provide both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options.

content.Placements: There are no placements in the medical stream. All the graduating students of this course get government or private jobs in hospitals across the country. The library is also quite large and has all the necessary books for undergraduates and post-graduate students. All the classrooms are smart classes with a large digital monitor in the front. The mess food is really nice. It provides a variety of north Indian and south Indian foods and that of good taste.

review_summary.college_name: Rishiraj College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My journey in Rishiraj Dental college.

content.Placements: Tier are total 100 students in the batch in 1st year. As I am in first year, I am not much aware of the placements. The highest, the lowest, and the average package offered by our course. I have seen lots of seniors completing their internships from the same college and placed in government hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The college environment and infrastructure are splendid and magnificent. There are different labs for different departments like prostho lab, dadh lab, biochemistry lab, physiology lab, and anatomy lab. The hostel is just behind the college takes 2-3 minutes to reach the college. The lecture hall is big enough for a 100-student batch.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great academics. I am absolutely satisfied.

content.Placements: I am a BDS student at Rishiraj College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre, Bhopal, Batch 19-20. Placement opportunities are decent here, with an average of about 85%. Various sessions for interns are conducted to help them to choose the right path based on their interests. Graduates secure positions in dental clinics, hospitals, private practices, dental chains, research institutions, government hospitals, international dental organizations, and academic institutions. The average salary for a fresher candidate is around 4-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: We have adopted interactive whiteboards or SMART Boards for teaching. Our clinics are well-equipped with the latest technologies. Hostel infrastructure has changed a lot in the last few years. Having AC and non-AC rooms with cupboards, beds, tables, chairs, Wi-Fi, and a playing area. There is also a night library.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for academics. The passing scale is also available. The faculty is knowledgeable

content.Placements: The placement scale is good. Many seniors I saw were placed in many government hospitals, including JK Hospital of the College, and also got placed as faculty in the college. Companies like Pepsodent and another tooth product company came with packages for students for research programs. Overall, college is good for academics and for future purposes too.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are good. I haven't seen the Wi-Fi yet. But I hope it will be provided soon. Classrooms have good infrastructure. Patient flow is also good. There are three hostels: girls hostels, boys hostels, and PG hostels. The food in the mess is good enough. Medical facilities and sports facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in central India.

content.Placements: Placements are quite good in our college. If you have good academic records, you will get placed in our college. The salary packages are decent. Top recruiting companies are Colgate and Sensodyne.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is modernised. The library is available in our college for students who want a peaceful place for learning. Wi-Fi is available in every department of our college. Smart classrooms are available in our college.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable, friendly, and helpful. Their teaching quality is the best. They conduct internal exams and viva sessions regularly. Non-teaching staff members are very cooperative.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It provides excellent staff and has great support.

content.Placements: As a BDS graduate, students can pursue 14 different careers including a master's degree in dental sciences, a master's degree in public health, and a master's degree in business administration. The lecturer and clinical practice are offered. It also offered overseas careers as a dentist and government jobs as a dentist.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are ill-maintained and food is not up to the mark. The buildings need renovation, the hostel mess is unhygienic, and water remains clogged in the sink for a decent amount of time making the vicinity smell horrific. Mosquitoes and stray dogs biting students is a major problem.

reviews.review_heading: My journey in Rishiraj Dental college.
reviews.review_text: The college environment and infrastructure are splendid and magnificent. There are different labs for different departments like prostho lab, dadh lab, biochemistry lab, physiology lab, and anatomy lab. The hostel is just behind the college takes 2-3 minutes to reach the college. The lecture hall is big enough for a 100-student batch.

reviews.review_heading: Great academics. I am absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: We have adopted interactive whiteboards or SMART Boards for teaching. Our clinics are well-equipped with the latest technologies. Hostel infrastructure has changed a lot in the last few years. Having AC and non-AC rooms with cupboards, beds, tables, chairs, Wi-Fi, and a playing area. There is also a night library.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for academics. The passing scale is also available. The faculty is knowledgeable
reviews.review_text: The labs are good. I haven't seen the Wi-Fi yet. But I hope it will be provided soon. Classrooms have good infrastructure. Patient flow is also good. There are three hostels: girls hostels, boys hostels, and PG hostels. The food in the mess is good enough. Medical facilities and sports facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in central India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is modernised. The library is available in our college for students who want a peaceful place for learning. Wi-Fi is available in every department of our college. Smart classrooms are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It provides excellent staff and has great support.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are ill-maintained and food is not up to the mark. The buildings need renovation, the hostel mess is unhygienic, and water remains clogged in the sink for a decent amount of time making the vicinity smell horrific. Mosquitoes and stray dogs biting students is a major problem.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with average infrastructure and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Labs in our college are well-equipped with all the essentials. Hostel and mess food are average and canteen is good with a variety of items. We have a cricket ground and a volleyball court on campus including various indoor games like table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities provided were good, and infrastructure for our course/department was also good. Even currently, the necessary facilities are available for students. Wi-Fi was available all time for beneficial use by students. Labs, classrooms and library were spacious and filled with all necessary equipment. Food served was healthy and hygienic in mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports and games all were available to students for their physical and mental growth.

reviews.review_heading: We have experienced faculty members, and they are trying their best.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi facility is available, and there are experienced lab staff members. Air-conditioned classrooms are available with proper lightening. The hostel is the best, and the food timings are very good. Mess staff members are very punctual at their jobs.

reviews.review_heading: It's a well-maintained college to let you be a well trained professional from a naive student.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities. There are well-maintained hostels, cleaned and aerated hallways auditorium and classrooms. Our college has a specially designed OT complex and wards for oral and maxillofacial surgery department, where I did my training. I loved the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members, helpful staff, healthy environment and good patient flow.
reviews.review_text: The library is good, and they need a proper E-library service. Labs and classrooms are properly ventilated and accommodate a big number of students. Hostel food quality needs to improve. Wi-Fi isn't available. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games happen timely.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and studies provided.
reviews.review_text: There are the best hostel facilities and mess. The food served is hygienic and good, and there is a proper guard facility. Regular sports and annual functions are conducted. The library is highly equipped with books and a Wi-Fi facility. CDE programs are conducted regularly to upgrade knowledge. Classrooms are equipped with projectors which help students to understand the subject better.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, there is an excellent team of full-time working faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It is a huge campus with facilities for both curricular and extracurricular activities. Our college has a badminton court, volleyball court, cricket ground, football ground, basketball court, table tennis, carrom and athletic activities. There is a huge library with a lot of books.

reviews.review_heading: Get quality dental education with excellent infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi equipped library with more than 5000 books for BDS and MS courses. Hygienic hostel and canteen mess facilities available. Separate boys and girls hostel with a huge ground for outdoor sports like football and cricket. The mess is providing food with excellent nutrients taking care of child health.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements after completing the course.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good environment for students. Labs are up to date, and classrooms are huge, neat and clean. The library consists of both medical and dental books. Good sports facilities are available. The canteen serves healthy food every time, and the warden in the hostel is always ready to help. The mess is good and serves good and hygienic breakfast, lunch, snacks and dinner. A good library is available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent institute with top-class facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are excellent with a very good library, and all books are readily available for students. There is a very good collection of medical and dental journals. Computer and internet facilities are available, and Wi-Fi is also available on the campus. All the labs are well-furnished for both UG and PG.

individual_reviews.title: ITS is nice and as it is. The medical college has a great environment.

content.Placements: More than 20 companies came there and a minimum of 25-30 students from a batch out of 100 got selected. They give the students a good package. The college provides development classes to face interviews and to give every student a job.

They too have indoor activity and a sports complex and 3 big grounds. I cannot tell you about the hostel as I live near the college only. .

individual_reviews.title: Best college in Ghaziabad.

content.Placements: Almost 90% and above students got placements in our college. The highest package was 12 Lacs per annum and the lowest package was 4.5 Lacs per annum in companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc. 80% of students got internships in different companies like Cipla and Sun Pharma.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has top facilities available like gym, playground, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, best labs, library, etc. Also, college has the best infrastructure. The hostel facilities were the best, and the food quality was amazing with proper hygiene. I also got medical care.

review_summary.college_name: K.V.S.R. Siddhartha College Of Pharmaceutical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college faculty behavior is good.

content.Placements: My college management contacts industries and laboratories, and they come to our college to conduct interviews. Those who are selected in the interview are given jobs with a salary of Rs.25,000 as the highest and Rs.15,000 as the lowest. Reddy's Labs and Divi's Labs offer these opportunities, with 50% of the roles being for drug inspectors and pharmacists.
content.Infrastructure: My college building is colorful. My college has 4 floors each floor is clean and neat. The college management provides each floor washrooms for girls and boys and providing cool and normal water. During rest time, a canteen is available. The hostel is very good. They maintain timings and provide quality food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: Our college offers B.Pharma, M.Pharma, and Pharm.D programs. Our college also offers placements from very good companies with better packages. They offer 2-2.5 LPA. They provide excellent placement training and better guidance about the future. They also guide the students about projects.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure and well-equipped labs. They also have hostel facilities. We also have a library with a lot of knowledgeable books. They also conduct events, sports, and other extracurricular activities for better enthusiasm and interest.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and highly qualified faculty.

content.Placements: There are no better placements for our course because competition is increasing day by day, and everyone is seeking more additional skills for getting placements. As I heard from our seniors, placed students are in single digits; out of 100 students in B.Pharma, only 4 or 5 students will get placed, but that's of no use for them. There are also no internships provided by our college. We should do it on our own.
content.Infrastructure: There are 2 smart classrooms in our college. They are good. Wi-Fi is so bad. The library is very vast, with a wide variety of books. Labs are clean, but there is a lack of some equipment. As I heard from hostel students, the food is okay in the hostel mess. Sports are encouraged in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: About my college life.

content.Placements: 70% of the students are placed in my course. The highest package offered in my course is 2-2.5 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 1 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are Optum, Dr. Reddy's, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course/department are very good. This includes Wi-Fi, neatly maintained labs, clean classrooms, and a library with a wide collection of books. The hostel facilities are also good, and the quality of food available in the mess is very good.
content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful, qualified, and experienced. We gain a lot of knowledge from them. The teaching quality is very good, and the teaching methods are also very useful. The semester exams in my college are of moderate difficulty. The pass percentage of the students is also high.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Short note of KVSR Siddhartha College of Pharmaceutical Sciences.

content.Placements: Above 60 percent of students were placed. The average package offered is 3,00,000, and the highest package is 5,00,000. Companies recruiting for our students are Divis, Reddys, Hetero Laboratories. 70 percent got internship facilities in industries. Manufacturing and quality control roles are offered in industries for us.
content.Infrastructure: We have smart classrooms, a library, and Wi-Fi connection. Our library has many books from many publishers. Our hostel has a large ground where we play. We write the menu for what we need. They provide milk, snacks, tea, etc. We have a canteen that offers various food items, including samosas, fried rice, puffs, chicken Manchurian, etc. Medical facilities are good and provided by the hostel.

reviews.review_text: Siddhartha Academy will provide the hostel for both girls and boys. There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. They will charge 5,000 per month. The food in the hostel will be good. The neatness of the hostel is good. There is a canteen in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Helpful to the students who want to study pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Siddhartha Academy provides hostel facilities for both boys and girls. The food quality is nice and tasty. Caretakers take care of us. The hostel provides Wi-Fi facilities. We have a playground to spend our time when we are exhausted. The hostel has a peaceful environment to spend quality time. In my college, we have different labs for different subjects like pharmacology, medicinal chemistry, organic chemistry, etc. Our labs are well-equipped with highly calibrated instruments. My college provi...

reviews.review_heading: A short information - My college.
reviews.review_text: In my college, we have different labs for different subjects like Medicinal Chemistry, Organic Chemistry, Pharmacology, and Pharmacognosy, etc. The labs are equipped with high-end equipment. In my college, we have Wi-Fi facilities. We have classes for BPH, Pharma D students, and also MPHARM students. Siddhartha Academy provides hostels for both boys and girls with quality food and a gym. In the hostel, we have a playground to spend some time when we are exhausted with studies. My hostel has a go...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are not very talented now compared to earlier.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are good and talented. Wi-Fi is available. We have labs. Classrooms are good. There is a good library with a lot of books. Hostel facilities are good. The food is average. There is no mess in our college. Sports and games are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with teaching faculty, good lab facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are excellent with an amazing infrastructure with well furnished and clean classrooms, labs with proper equipment, sports room for indoor games. The library is available where you can find lots of books related to pharmacy and others. Food is good in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and placement is good in my college .
reviews.review_text: Facilities is excellent they provide clean classrooms before students enter in class room and college provide Wi-Fi and college have excellent labs and equipment is provided and library is available in which all pharmacy books are arranged in easy way to find out and hostel, mess, canteen is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for local people in Vijayawada, and it has well-equipped labs and a huge library.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure. The classrooms are huge and well-furnished and have good ventilation. We also have a huge library where we can find any book related to pharmacy. We do play carrom, table tennis, throw ball etc. The food is good in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, but not with placements. The infrastructure and facilities are average.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are good, though the library is small and has a limited number of books. The food is not very good, and there is no canteen. A hospital is attached to the college. Sports and games facilities are available. We have a sports fest in which other colleges collaborate with us.

reviews.review_heading: About my college life I'm fully satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course / department are very good like Wi-Fi, neatly maintained labs, and clean classrooms and also we have good library with wide collection of books. The quality of the facilities in our college hostel is very neatly provided.

placements.overview: PG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year PG Degree, a total of 18 students were admitted at Vinayaka Mission's Sankarachariyar Dental College, Salem, Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundation and 18 completed their graduation in 2020-21. reviews_list.review_title: I wouldn't recommend this college to anyone.

review_content.Placements: Quadra Institute of Medical Sciences offers very good studies and it is nice in academic activities. This college offers 6 months of internships on campus and 6 months off campus. Almost 100% of students are offered on-campus internships. The faculty is good .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is not so good. Campus is very small and compact. No grounds and sports. The hostel is also not good. Mess food is also very bad. The electricity supply of the hostel is not proper. There is Wi-Fi connectivity on the ground floor of the college building .

review_content.Placements: There is no policy regarding placements in the college. Students themselves have to look for their job opportunities. Depending upon the needs and interests of the students, some believe in doing post graduation and some believe in doing Jobs in the hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Better infrastructure as compared to other colleges of same courses within the state. There is facility of library, well ventilated classrooms, labs, proper parking area, neat and clean hospital and wards, clean and properly managed OPD chambers etc.

reviews_list.review_title: I am definitely satisfied with our college, which provides all types of security and facilities.

review_content.Faculty: All our teachers are well qualified and provide a good source of information, which gives us knowledge about our field. We have got at least 25 faculty members who are well experienced and have doctorates in medicine as well as in surgery. This course is absolutely relevant as it gives knowledge about the Indian tradition.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I have enjoyed my 4 years in RGIT, and I had the best time on campus.

review_content.Placements: I was in computer science student, and we had 2 sections. The highest strength is recorded in CSE followed by biomedical engineering. There were no placements in 2020 and 2021. I think it was due to covid-19 situation. Now, there might be placements from this year.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, but some of my friends are from Kerala. They used to stay in the hostel. They always used to say that the hostel food was bad. Rooms are always clean and have separate restrooms. They had to follow hostel timings, and they were not allowed to go out after 9 pm.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the off-course faculty and their behaviour.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any placement opportunities. Sometimes, local business people visit the college to hire students. So they don't even conduct any placement drives. Whenever a company visit the college, they just go back without hiring any student. They organise a job fair which is useless, and this is a business trick to make money.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there is no playground. It's difficult to survive in the college for four years. Classrooms and labs are in the worst condition. I suggest you be careful when you choose a college. The equipment in the labs is good, and all the equipment is useless.

review_summary.college_name: RGC - Rajiv Gandhi Group of Institution Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is worth reading in this college. All teachers and staff members are supportive and friendly.

content.Placements: There are around 73 students in our class. The highest salary package offered is about 9 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 4 LPA. Around 85% of the students got internships from our course because it is a must and in the final semester it carries marks.
content.Infrastructure: ]Our college has a good infrastructure. There is a small canteen which is near the ground. He prepares all the items which are good for our health and it is hygienic as well. There is no Wi-Fi connectivity in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of RGC - Rajiv Gandhi Group of Institution.

content.Placements: According to my knowledge, 60% of students got placed in computer science and engineering department. The annual package offered was around 1.5 to 3 LPA. Some students got seats through CET. It was around 70,000 for them. There were different branches in engineering, like mechanical, computer science, biomedical, civil engineering etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. The college has a library, from where we can take books, read them and even take them home. Later, we have to return them. Our classrooms are good. There are many different auditoriums for different branches. Labs are not fully equipped.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I have enjoyed my 4 years in RGIT, and I had the best time on campus.

content.Placements: I was in computer science student, and we had 2 sections. The highest strength is recorded in CSE followed by biomedical engineering. There were no placements in 2020 and 2021. I think it was due to covid-19 situation. Now, there might be placements from this year.
content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, but some of my friends are from Kerala. They used to stay in the hostel. They always used to say that the hostel food was bad. Rooms are always clean and have separate restrooms. They had to follow hostel timings, and they were not allowed to go out after 9 pm.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the off-course faculty and their behaviour.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any placement opportunities. Sometimes, local business people visit the college to hire students. So they don't even conduct any placement drives. Whenever a company visit the college, they just go back without hiring any student. They organise a job fair which is useless, and this is a business trick to make money.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there is no playground. It's difficult to survive in the college for four years. Classrooms and labs are in the worst condition. I suggest you be careful when you choose a college. The equipment in the labs is good, and all the equipment is useless.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied by the Infrastructure of college,Good faculties and average Placements.

content.Placements: Placements for my batch has not yet started. But for my seniors batch the placements was held. And only 5 students were selected out of 60. The highest average salary was offered 3,00000 and the lowest was about 150000. The companies visited our campus for placements are Wipro, Infosys, IBM, and several other companies also. Different kinds of roles were offered to the selected members like Testing, Software development, Web desighee etc. There are no internships given to the students. And there is no proper placement cell in the college. In my opinion placements in our college are not much useful for students. I think in future the placements will be given more and it will be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied by the Infrastructure of college,Good faculties and average Placements.
reviews.review_text: The College Campus environment is really good with having plenty of tree shades around. But there is no proper parking facility for both students and faculty members vehicles. The facilities provided in this college include Labs, Classrooms, Library, Sports and Games. The quality of labs is good. The labs are maintained properly and all the computers in the labs are in good working condition and have all types of software's. The quality of food we can get in the college campus is average. We can...

reviews.review_heading: The placements could have been better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay, and not bad. Still, the labs and workshops can be well-established. They should bring in good, and little canteens are inside the campus, who can provide good and hygienic food. They should facilitate Wi-Fi for students, which helps them in career enhancement. They should provide proper parking slots for student's vehicles.

reviews.review_heading: It is fairly a good college, but do not take this as the first choice as there are some issues.
reviews.review_text: There is no access to Wi-Fi. The labs are good, classrooms are average, and the library is good. The college has badminton and basketball courts available. The quality of labs is good, it has necessary things in it. No issues. The classrooms are average but not that good. The quality of food is average, the hostels are good and have average food. The infrastructure issues were there, but those were resolved. The college is average in infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely disagreeing with the college attitude.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, and there is no sports or ground, but they organise sports once in a year. The classes are okay, but I am not satisfied with that. The library is not good, and there is no digital library, and they are not mandatory,  but they are trying to get one.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college. Just visit and check before joining the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but it in a very less area. The college doesn't have a big playground, but yearly they conduct sports. There are different medical colleges on the same campus. The college also looks good. The teachers are very friendly, and there is a small canteen inside the college, but it's not good to lunch at noon.

reviews.review_heading: A name not suitable for the college, don't think its a good college just because of its location.
reviews.review_text: There is no open Wi-Fi facility provided to the students. The labs are decent but nothing to shout about. The library is good overall but lacks data-handbooks for the mechanical branch students in sufficient numbers. There is one basketball court and a volleyball court. Sports day is conducted in HMT grounds. The quality of food is average. In the hostel, in one room 3-4 people have to accommodate. The college is having less number of toilets compared to the number of students, which is one real...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied by the infrastructure, teaching and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was the worst among any other colleges in Bangalore. The building stands in a very remote place with less space. There was no gate or wall around the college which makes all the commutators and locals pass by the college and even the street dogs roam around the classrooms. They don't have a playground nor a parking lot in the college. Hostel was insecure because the hostel was inside the college. The hostels were the old classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am not happy with my college because they didn't provide placements and placement training.
reviews.review_text:
Not good. It is nice to see the campus from the outside but the facilities in the classroom are very poor. They don't have PPTs in classrooms.
Desks are always broken. Fans are not working properly. Labs are the worst (mechanical).
Computer labs have old software which is outdated. Machines in the labs are also too old. They just provide a demo and tell us to write the values from the old record book.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements of the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure structure, in my point of view, was not at all a good surrounding campus as the college was near local locality between the homes of the people. There was not enough space in the college and we never had any place to play outdoor games except for basketball court and a baseball place.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: PCPS - Periyar College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Pharma, UG Diploma and D.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the PCPS - Periyar College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers M.Pharma.

faqs.answer: A:    PCPS - Periyar College of Pharmaceutical Sciences is a good institution for Pharm.D, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, D.Pharma, UG Diploma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at PCPS - Periyar College of Pharmaceutical Sciences are Pharmacy Practice, Pharmacognosy, Pharmaceutical, Medical Laboratory Technology.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with Campus Life.

review_content.Placements: No placements are done for B.Pharma students. Placements are only done for Diploma students. Diploma students got placed in reputed hospitals like KMC and Apollo Hospitals. 60% students get placed. Last year, B.Pharma students got placement arranged by our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best as compared to other pharmacy colleges. We have the best library with many books related to pharmacy field. We have a big classroom which is enough for us. No Wi-Fi facility is there. No hostel facility is present for boys, it is only for Girls.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its laboratory facilities.

content.Placements: There are no placements offered in our course. Almost 60% of students got placed in reputed local hospitals like KMC and Apollo Hospitals as a hospital pharmacists.
content.Infrastructure: It has a huge library with a lot of pharma books for references. There are no hostel facilities for boys. The food quality is average. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are spacious. There are 5 laboratories on our campus.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are knowledgeable and helpful. Few of them are Ph.D. scholars. The teaching quality is average. The course curriculum does not make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are easy. The pass percentage is 95%. Many students pass exams easily.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied with its sports facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are good in our college. Many students got placed in reputed hospitals like KMC and Apollo Hospital. The top role offered is a pharmacist. Around 40% of students got placed in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best in our college. All facilities are available in our college. Wi-Fi facility is not available. There are no hostels for boys, and we have to search for an outside room by ourselves. It also provides a huge laboratory and the equipment is enough for practicals. Classrooms are spacious. The library is huge and several books are available.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with Campus Life.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best as compared to other pharmacy colleges. We have the best library with many books related to pharmacy field. We have a big classroom which is enough for us. No Wi-Fi facility is there. No hostel facility is present for boys, it is only for Girls.

individual_reviews.title: In college, a good education in pharmacy.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with campus life, training and placements.

content.Placements: Internships are not available for B. Pharma students at our college. They are only available for diploma students at the GH Hospital. Our college does not provide placement services for B. Pharma students. We prefer that you search on your own. Only D. pharma students get placements through our college at reputed local hospitals like KMC, Apollo, etc. as hospital pharmacists.
content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't provide a hostel for boys, it's only for girls. The hostel food is average. We have large classrooms with plenty of benches. We have a huge library with many books related to pharmacy and many other general books, and they provide a newspaper and pharmacy journal daily. We have a huge lab for practicals. Wi-Fi is not available throughout the campus.

review_content.Placements: There are more than 30 students from my batch. The course fee is around 1.2 Lacs per year (3+1 year internship without any fee). The students of our college prefer internship in our own hospital at Narayana health city Bangalore. The clinical exposure is great here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Big classrooms with great ventilation and also library are provided. There are labs for each department. Hostel facility is also good, with an entertainment zone and a canteen provided. Good atmosphere with security and warden. There are cctvs also.

review_content.Placements: Around 30% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 5,000 per month. The role offered is technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has labs, classrooms, and a library. The food served in the mess is not good. The paid mess is good. Medical facilities are expensive. They won't provide sports and games facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.S. Course in Cardiac Care Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All students get good placements, and colleges provide us with internships for a better future.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students get placements. Placements depend on skills. Students also get direct campus placements after internships. The average expected salary is around INR 15-20k/month, the highest expected salary is around INR 25-30k/month, and the lowest expected salary is around INR 5-10k/month. Some of the top recruiters are Apollo Hospital, AIIMS Fortis Hospital, Columbia Asian Hospital, and many more. Roles offered are technician (i.e., cardiovascular technician, Cath lab technician, etc.).
content.Infrastructure: The college has a library facility for all the students, department-based laboratory facilities, sports facilities, cafeterias, auditorium facilities, separate hostels for boys and girls, college buses, waiting halls and rooms, a healthcare center with first aid facilities for all the students, and an excellent IT infrastructure facility.

To secure admission at Narayana Hrudayalaya_Paramedical, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process atNarayana Hrudayalaya_Paramedicalis conducted online. Read the article to know more about the Narayana Hrudayalaya_Paramedical course admission 2025. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Narayana Hrudayalaya_Paramedical Duration: The duration of the UG courses is 3 years. The duration of PG courses is 2 years.
